     design rules, the auto-wire convention, and the registry workflow. -->

## What

<!-- One paragraph: what changes and why. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md) (design rules, imports, auto-wire convention)
- [ ] `pnpm build:registry` re-run if a registry component / its JSDoc changed
- [ ] Tests for logic-bearing behavior (`apps/web/__tests__/registry/`)
- [ ] Changeset added if `packages/*` changed (`pnpm changeset`) — or the `no-changeset-needed` label
- [ ] No `Co-Authored-By` trailers on commits
